predicates.name: has_legal_personality
predicates.description: The company has legal personality (rechtspersoonlijkheid). This is a background status that may be directly asserted from case facts.

predicates.name: is_starting_company
predicates.description: The company is starting its business (beginning of first financial year).

predicates.name: is_first_financial_year
predicates.description: The financial year is the first financial year of the company.

predicates.name: good_faith_estimate_shows_more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: A good-faith estimate at the start of the first financial year shows that more than one criterion will be exceeded during that year.

predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual average employee threshold in the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual net turnover threshold (excluding VAT) in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total threshold in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the three statutory criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a small company (kleine vennootschap) for the given financial year.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover excluding VAT of the company in the financial year, as referred to in article 1:26/1.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company at the balance sheet date of the financial year.
